Profile

Civil Engineer
& BIM Specialist

Results-driven Civil Engineer with a Master of Science in Construction Management from California State University, Fresno (GPA 3.6). Currently working as an Office Engineer at Flatiron Dragados on the $1.2 billion LA Outfall Tunnel.

My expertise sits at the intersection of BIM modeling, heavy civil infrastructure, and construction technology — translating complex field challenges into precise digital models that drive better decisions, fewer clashes, and faster delivery.

Contributed to India's first high-speed rail project and the $2B California High-Speed Rail program, gaining deep fluency in precast systems, post-tensioning, QA/QC, NDT testing, and scheduling on mega-infrastructure projects.

Research focus: AI-driven construction cost estimation — applying machine learning and neural networks to improve accuracy in forecasting and risk assessment.

Work History

Experience

MAY 2025 — PRESENT$1.2 Billion
Office Engineer
Flatiron Dragados · LA Outfall Tunnel, Los Angeles CA

Reporting daily TBM production metrics for EPB tunnel heading; preparing shift reports, ground surface settlement graphs, and groundwater monitoring. Developing 3D models in Revit and BricsCad for tunnel support work, resolving Navisworks clashes. Led tunnel shotcrete remediation — onboarding specialty subcontractor, WBS-detailed takeoffs, and cost packages. Managing 3-week lookahead and 10-week activity programs.

RevitBricsCadAutoCAD 3DTBM OperationsShotcreteP6 SchedulingSub Onboarding
MAY 2024 — DEC 2024$2.0 Billion
Field Engineer
Flatiron Construction · California High-Speed Rail, Fresno CA

Managed project planning on the $2B CA HSR program. Developed 3-week look-ahead schedules, coordinated 5+ engineers and 4+ subcontractors, resolved 12+ on-site design issues using 3D BIM models. Performed detailed quantity takeoffs, identified bid discrepancies, and maintained QC standards per state/federal regulations.

3D BIM ModelingQuantity TakeoffSub CoordinationQC / ComplianceCost Control
JAN 2022 — DEC 2022India's First HSR
Field Engineer QA/QC
TATA Consulting Engineers Limited · India

Led QC for FSLM girder construction — 17 CY concrete pours and 45MT steel reinforcement. Evaluated M40/M50 trial mixes with microsilica. Conducted NDT (UPV, Rebound Hammer), post-tensioning quality checks, and temperature monitoring via thermocouples across seasons.

NDT TestingPost-TensioningPrecast QCM40/M50 ConcreteFSLM Girders
MAR 2021 — DEC 2021
Field Engineer QA/QC
Megha Engineering Infrastructure · India

Material tests on river sand and fly ash; M40/M50 trial mixes. Maintained NCR & MPR documentation. Developed ITPs and checklists for site activities including PSC I-section girder casting.
